dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend c = content, co = company | extend n = tostring(c.number) | project TimeGenerated = now(), TicketId = tolong(id), Status = tostring(status), StatusTimestamp = todatetime(status_timestamp), Created = todatetime(created), ContentType = tostring(content_type), CompanyId = toint(co.id), CompanyName = tostring(co.name), CardBin = iff(strlen(n) >= 6, substring(n, 0, 6), ''), CardLast4 = iff(strlen(n) >= 4, substring(n, strlen(n) - 4, 4), n), CardMasked = strcat(iff(strlen(n) >= 6, substring(n, 0, 6), ''), '******', iff(strlen(n) >= 4, substring(n, strlen(n) - 4, 4), n)), CardBrand = case(substring(n, 0, 1) == '4', 'Visa', toint(substring(n, 0, 2)) >= 51 and toint(substring(n, 0, 2)) <= 55, 'Mastercard', toint(substring(n, 0, 2)) >= 22 and toint(substring(n, 0, 2)) <= 27, 'Mastercard', substring(n, 0, 2) == '34' or substring(n, 0, 2) == '37', 'Amex', substring(n, 0, 4) == '6011' or substring(n, 0, 2) == '65', 'Discover', substring(n, 0, 2) == '36' or substring(n, 0, 2) == '38', 'Diners Club', 'Other'), CardLength = toint(strlen(n)), ExpirationDate = todatetime(c.expiration_date)
